items.label: Features
items.content: Our platform includes real-time collaboration, advanced analytics, and seamless integrations with your favorite tools.

items.label: Pricing
items.content: We offer flexible plans starting at $9/month for individuals, $29/month for teams, and custom enterprise pricing.

items.label: FAQ
items.content: Have questions? Our product supports all major browsers, offers 99.9% uptime, and includes 24/7 customer support.
